allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(r\)} routes for driver 1'\); [print\(f'  Route {x[\\"id\\"]}: {len\(x[\\"waypoints\\"] or []\)} wps, status={x[\\"status\\"]}'\) for x in r[:3]]")
